scripts.push-force: node -e "console.error('refusing to run drizzle push --force: src/schema/index.ts is empty so this would DROP every undeclared table (email_drafts, email_hosted_images, session). See replit.md > scripts/post-merge.sh for context. To intentionally run it set ALLOW_DRIZZLE_FORCE=1.'); process.exit(process.env.ALLOW_DRIZZLE_FORCE === '1' ? 0 : 1)" && drizzle-kit push --force --config ./drizzle.config.ts
